text.title: strategy-analysis-current-state Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for strategy-analysis-current-state as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: SWOT cells with generic items: "Technology is changing fast" or "Market is competitive".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: No link to the org's specific exposure; output gets ignored in steering reviews. Force per-cell relevance_to_us with concrete impact quantified where possible.
